positive: A stylized, symmetrical celestial forest scene. The main subject is a majestic cluster of glowing, bioluminescent flora and fauna forming an intricate, central composition. Features include stylized, geometric crescent moons, floating glowing lanterns, and stylized silhouettes of whimsical forest creatures (like deer and foxes) interacting with oversized, luminous leaves. The overall style should be highly detailed, clean line art combined with vibrant, neon-soaked colors (deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and touches of iridescent gold). Strong contrast, flat color blocking where appropriate, and intricate negative space. Perfect for high-quality t-shirt printing, suitable for screen printing effect, vector art style, octane render, highly saturated, minimal shadows, rule of thirds composition.
